COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-13-2003 Text Ruling

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-28-2002 Continued To Jan-13-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-10-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The cause came on calendar for continued settlement conference. The parties appeared through their counsel. Curtis Cirillo for CCSF and Joesph Sacramento, Esq. for defendant. Court and counsel confer in chambers. Case does not settle. Trial date confirmed.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2002 Continued To Oct-10-02 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 504
MINI MINUTES: DEPT. 504, Judge ROBERT L. DONDERO, Clerk JOSE RIOS-MERIDA, Reporter SARA LERSCHEN, CSR#6213.

04:15 P.M. - Cause called for mandatory settlement conference.

Plaintiff Attorney, CURTIS CHRISTY-CIRILLO, Deputy City Attorney, PRESENT.
Defendant Attorney, JOSEPH A. SACRAMENTO, Esq., PRESENT.

Court and counsel confer in chambers off record.

The settlement conference is continued to October 10 at 08:30 a.m., in Department 504.

STATUS CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2002 Set For Trial On Oct-28-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Oct-09-02 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 504

City'S Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar May-02-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: 11 Appearances: Curtis Christy-Cirillo, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, City and County of San Francisco, (415) 554-3852, appeared on behalf of moving party City and County of San Francisco.

There being no appearances, the Court adopted its tentative ruling as the order of the Court: GRANTED. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. (JJM) Reporter: Eric Throne CSR#7855
